export enum UserServiceCommonCode {
  UserServiceCommonCodeNone = 0,
  Success = 1,
  Reject = 2,
  INVALID_PARAM = 3,
  DUPLICATE_REQ = 4,
  Failed = 99,
  /**
   * USER_NOT_FOUND - TODO
   * Remove these once frontend has migrated to UserStatus
   */

  USER_BANNED = 101,
  USER_SUSPENDED = 102,
  USER_NOT_ELIGIBLE = 103,
  INS_PWA_ORDER_NOT_FINISH = 105,
  /** USER_BALANCE_INSUFFICIENT - 订阅相关 */
  USER_BALANCE_INSUFFICIENT = 110,
  USER_FREE_COUNT_NEED_REFRESH = 111,
  /** USER_FETCH_FAILED - 报错 */
  USER_FETCH_FAILED = 120,
  /** USER_HAS_SIGNED_IN_TODAY - 用户已经签到过 */
  USER_HAS_SIGNED_IN_TODAY = 121,
  /** USER_GIFT_ID_INVALID - giftid 是无效的 */
  USER_GIFT_ID_INVALID = 130,
  /** USER_COIN_NOT_ENOUGH - 用户金币不够 */
  USER_COIN_NOT_ENOUGH = 131,
  /** USER_BALANCE_NOT_ENOUGH - 用户余额不够 */
  USER_BALANCE_NOT_ENOUGH = 132,
  /** USER_WAITING_EARN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED - 用户次数超了快 */
  USER_WAITING_EARN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 133,
  /** USER_WITHDRAW_OVER_LIMIT - 体现单金额重复 */
  USER_WITHDRAW_OVER_LIMIT = 134,
  /** USER_TEXT_EARN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED - 用户聊天加钱次数超了 */
  USER_TEXT_EARN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = 135,
  /** USER_ENTITLEMENT_HAS_CLAIMED - 权益相关 Entitlement */
  USER_ENTITLEMENT_HAS_CLAIMED = 200,
  USER_ENTITLEMENT_PERMISSION_DENIED = 201,
  /** USER_INVITE_CODE_INVALID - 邀请码相关 */
  USER_INVITE_CODE_INVALID = 300,
  /** USER_HAS_BIND_INVITE_CODE - 已经绑定过邀请码 */
  USER_HAS_BIND_INVITE_CODE = 301,
  /** USER_UNSAFE_CONTENT - 安全相关 */
  USER_UNSAFE_CONTENT = 400,
  /** USER_VOICE_NOMATCH_SCENE_CONTENT - 内容不符合场景的 */
  USER_VOICE_NOMATCH_SCENE_CONTENT = 401,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export enum SusBehaviorType {
  UNKNOWN_BEHAVIOR = 0,
  /** SYSTEM_LOCALE - CN 100分 */
  SYSTEM_LOCALE = 1,
  /** SYSTEM_TIMEZONE - CN 100分 */
  SYSTEM_TIMEZONE = 2,
  /** SYSTEM_LANGUAGE - zh 100分 */
  SYSTEM_LANGUAGE = 3,
  /** VPN_ON - 50分 */
  VPN_ON = 4,
  /** SCREENSHOT_COUNT - 截屏>=2次 +30分 */
  SCREENSHOT_COUNT = 5,
  /** CHARGING_STATE - charging +5分，full+30分 */
  CHARGING_STATE = 6,
  /** SIM_CARD - 30分 */
  SIM_CARD = 7,
  /** PROXY_ON - 100分 */
  PROXY_ON = 8,
  ROOT_ON = 9,
  EMULATOR_ON = 10,
  ORGANIC = 11,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

    case 3:

    case 5:

    case 8:

    case 9:
    case "ROOT_ON":
      return SusBehaviorType.ROOT_ON;
    case 10:
    case "EMULATOR_ON":
      return SusBehaviorType.EMULATOR_ON;
    case 11:
    case "ORGANIC":
      return SusBehaviorType.ORGANIC;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":

  }
}

}

export function actionTypeToJSON(object: ActionType): string {
  switch (object) {
    case ActionType.PAID:

    case ActionType.RENEW:
      return "RENEW";
    case ActionType.REFUND:
      return "REFUND";
    case ActionType.EXPIRE:
      return "EXPIRE";
    case ActionType.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

}

export enum CallOrderFinishReasonType {
  /** NORMAL - 默认正常 */
  NORMAL = 0,
  /** INIT_MALE_CANCEL - init男用户取消 */
  INIT_MALE_CANCEL = 1,
  /** INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL - init女用户取消 */
  INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL = 2,
  /** NORMAL_MALE_HANG_UP - 正常接通男用户不足一秒挂断 */
  NORMAL_MALE_HANG_UP = 3,
  /** NORMAL_FEMALE_HANG_UP - 正常接通女用户不足一秒挂断 */
  NORMAL_FEMALE_HANG_UP = 4,
  TIM_CALLBACK_FINISH = 5,
  /** FEMALE_CALL_REJECT - 女拒接 */
  FEMALE_CALL_REJECT = 6,
  /** FEMALE_BUSY - 女 busy */
  FEMALE_BUSY = 7,
  /** FEMALE_NO_RESPONSE - 女未响应 */
  FEMALE_NO_RESPONSE = 8,
  /** MALE_CANCEL_WITHIN_5S - 5s内男取消 */
  MALE_CANCEL_WITHIN_5S = 9,
  /** MALE_CANCEL_TIMEOUT_5S - 超时5s男取消 */
  MALE_CANCEL_TIMEOUT_5S = 10,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function callOrderFinishReasonTypeFromJSON(object: any): CallOrderFinishReasonType {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "NORMAL":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.NORMAL;
    case 1:
    case "INIT_MALE_CANCEL":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.INIT_MALE_CANCEL;
    case 2:
    case "INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL;
    case 3:
    case "NORMAL_MALE_HANG_UP":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.NORMAL_MALE_HANG_UP;
    case 4:
    case "NORMAL_FEMALE_HANG_UP":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.NORMAL_FEMALE_HANG_UP;
    case 5:
    case "TIM_CALLBACK_FINISH":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.TIM_CALLBACK_FINISH;
    case 6:
    case "FEMALE_CALL_REJECT":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.FEMALE_CALL_REJECT;
    case 7:
    case "FEMALE_BUSY":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.FEMALE_BUSY;
    case 8:
    case "FEMALE_NO_RESPONSE":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.FEMALE_NO_RESPONSE;
    case 9:
    case "MALE_CANCEL_WITHIN_5S":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.MALE_CANCEL_WITHIN_5S;
    case 10:
    case "MALE_CANCEL_TIMEOUT_5S":
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.MALE_CANCEL_TIMEOUT_5S;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return CallOrderFinishReasonType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function callOrderFinishReasonTypeToJSON(object: CallOrderFinishReasonType): string {
  switch (object) {
    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.NORMAL:
      return "NORMAL";
    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.INIT_MALE_CANCEL:
      return "INIT_MALE_CANCEL";
    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL:
      return "INIT_FEMALE_CANCEL";
    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.NORMAL_MALE_HANG_UP:

    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.FEMALE_BUSY:

    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.FEMALE_NO_RESPONSE:

    case CallOrderFinishReasonType.MALE_CANCEL_WITHIN_5S:

  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_BUY_COIN = 1,

  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_CHECK_IN = 3,

  /** USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_SUB - 用户订阅给的金币 */

  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_MESSAGE_TEXT = 7,
  /** USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_MESSAGE_VIDEO - 用户发送的视频消息 消耗 */
  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_MESSAGE_VIDEO = 8,
  /** USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_MESSAGE_AUDIO - 用户发送的音频消息 消耗 */
  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_MESSAGE_AUDIO = 9,
  /** USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_VIDEO - 新用户 首次视频奖励 */
  USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_VIDEO = 10,
  /** USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_AUDIO - 新用户 首次音频奖励 */

      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_VIDEO;
    case 11:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_AUDIO":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_AUDIO;
    case 12:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_TEXT":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_NEW_REWARD_TEXT;
    case 13:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_SUPER_LIKE":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_SUPER_LIKE;
    case 14:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_STREAK_CHECKIN":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_STREAK_CHECKIN;
    case 15:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_INS_EXCHANGE_ORDER_REFUND":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_INS_EXCHANGE_ORDER_REFUND;
    case 16:
    case "USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_INS_EXCHANGE_COST":
      return userCoinChangeType.USER_COIN_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_INS_EXCHANGE_COST;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return userCoinChangeType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

  switch (object) {

export enum pwaStatus {
  /** PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN - 未知或未指定的状态 */
  PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN = 0,
  /** PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE - 前台在线活跃小利女：打开LIVE且IM在线的小利女。 */
  PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE = 1,
  /** PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE - 前台在线非活跃小利女：未开LIVE但IM在线 */
  PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE = 2,
  /** PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY - 忙线小利女：实时在线且在接听电话中的小利女。 */
  PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY = 3,
  /** PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE - 后台在线活跃小利女：PWA在后台，打开LIVE 且IM在线 */
  PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE = 4,
  /** PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE - 后台在线非活跃小利女：未开着Live 但IM在线 */
  PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE = 5,
  /** PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE - 离线小利女：离线状态的小利女。 */
  PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE = 6,
  /** PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE - 前台在线，未开LIVE且IM不在线 */
  PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE = 7,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function pwaStatusFromJSON(object: any): pwaStatus {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN;
    case 1:
    case "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE;
    case 2:
    case "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE;
    case 3:
    case "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY;
    case 4:
    case "PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE;
    case 5:
    case "PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE;
    case 6:
    case "PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE;
    case 7:
    case "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE":
      return pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return pwaStatus.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function pwaStatusToJSON(object: pwaStatus): string {
  switch (object) {
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN:
      return "PWA_STATUS_UNKNOWN";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY:
      return "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_ONLINE_BUSY";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_ACTIVE";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_BACKEND_ONLINE_INACTIVE";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_OFFLINE";
    case pwaStatus.PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE:
      return "PWA_STATUS_FRONTEND_OFFLINE";
    case pwaStatus.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

export enum MessageType {
  MESSAGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
  /** MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT - 文字消息 */
  MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT = 1,
  /** MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO - 视频消息 */
  MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO = 3,
  /** MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO - 音频消息 */
  MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO = 4,
  /** MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE - gc2.2 super like */
  MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE = 5,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "MESSAGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN":
      return MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN;
    case 1:
    case "MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT":
      return MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT;
    case 3:
    case "MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO":
      return MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO;
    case 4:
    case "MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO":
      return MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO;
    case 5:
    case "MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE":
      return MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return MessageType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

  switch (object) {
    case MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN:
      return "MESSAGE_TYPE_UNKNOWN";
    case MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT:
      return "MESSAGE_TYPE_TEXT";
    case MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO:
      return "MESSAGE_TYPE_VIDEO";
    case MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO:
      return "MESSAGE_TYPE_AUDIO";
    case MessageType.MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE:
      return "MESSAGE_TYPE_SUPER_LIKE";
    case MessageType.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

/** 权益类型 */
export enum EntitlementType {
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO - 视频送金币 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO = 1,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO - 音频送金币 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO = 2,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT - 文本送金币 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT = 3,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT_V2 - 文本权益 v2版本，老版本是送金币 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT_V2 = 4,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO_VIDEO_SHARE - 视频，音频共享免费 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO_VIDEO_SHARE = 5,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_SUPER_LIKE - gc 2.2里的super like */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_SUPER_LIKE = 6,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI - dora Super Hi */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI = 7,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_BOOST - dora boost权益 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_BOOST = 8,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FEED_MESSAGE - feed页面发送消息 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FEED_MESSAGE = 9,
  /** ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI_FREE - Super Hi 赠送免费权益 */
  ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI_FREE = 10,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function entitlementTypeFromJSON(object: any): EntitlementType {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_UNKNOWN":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_UNKNOWN;
    case 1:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO;
    case 2:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO;
    case 3:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT;
    case 4:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT_V2":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT_V2;
    case 5:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO_VIDEO_SHARE":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO_VIDEO_SHARE;
    case 6:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_SUPER_LIKE":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_SUPER_LIKE;
    case 7:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI;
    case 8:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_BOOST":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_BOOST;
    case 9:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FEED_MESSAGE":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FEED_MESSAGE;
    case 10:
    case "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI_FREE":
      return EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_SUPER_HI_FREE;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return EntitlementType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function entitlementTypeToJSON(object: EntitlementType): string {
  switch (object) {
    case EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_UNKNOWN:
      return "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_UNKNOWN";
    case EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO:
      return "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_VIDEO";
    case EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO:
      return "ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_AUDIO";
    case EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT:

    case EntitlementType.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE_FREE_TEXT_V2:

/** 金币明细类型 */
export enum PwaUserBalanceChangeType {
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED = 0,
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_VIDEO_CALL = 1,
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_VOICE_CALL = 2,
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_MESSAGE_TEXT = 3,
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_LIVE_STREAM = 4,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_CHAT_ORDER - chat order */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_CHAT_ORDER = 5,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_DAILY_TASK - dailytask */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_DAILY_TASK = 6,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_ONBOARDING_TASK - onboarding task */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_ONBOARDING_TASK = 7,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_TUTORIAL_TASK - tutorial task */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_TUTORIAL_TASK = 8,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SEND_GIFT - send gift */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SEND_GIFT = 9,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_WAITING_REWARD - waiting reward */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_WAITING_REWARD = 10,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_COST - spin cost */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_COST = 11,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_WIN - spin win */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_WIN = 12,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_RECEIVE_GIFT - receive gift */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_RECEIVE_GIFT = 13,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_NOT_ENOUGH_REWARD - spin not enough reward */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_SPIN_NOT_ENOUGH_REWARD = 14,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_VIDEO_TEST_REWARD - user video test reward */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_VIDEO_TEST_REWARD = 15,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_VIDEO_TEST_LOSS - user video test loss */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_USER_VIDEO_TEST_LOSS = 16,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_INS_MESSAGE_TEXT - ins message reward */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_INS_MESSAGE_TEXT = 17,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_INS_FOLLOW_REWARD - ins关注奖励 */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_INS_FOLLOW_REWARD = 18,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_MOCK_VIDEO - MOCK video 奖励 */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_MOCK_VIDEO = 19,
  /** PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_BFF_REWARD - BFF 裂变奖励 */
  PWA_USER_BALANCE_CHANGE_TYPE_BFF_REWARD = 20,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

/** 会话状态 */
export enum MatchStatus {
  /** MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL - 缺省(正常) */
  MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL = 0,
  /** MATCH_STATUS_INVALID - 会话失效 */
  MATCH_STATUS_INVALID = 1,
  /** MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL - 会话不活跃-正常 */
  MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL = 2,
  /** MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID - 会话不活跃-失效 */
  MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID = 3,
  /** MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED - 会话已解锁 */
  MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED = 4,
  /** MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED - 会话不活跃-已解锁 */
  MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED = 5,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function matchStatusFromJSON(object: any): MatchStatus {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL;
    case 1:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_INVALID":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INVALID;
    case 2:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL;
    case 3:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID;
    case 4:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED;
    case 5:
    case "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED":
      return MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return MatchStatus.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function matchStatusToJSON(object: MatchStatus): string {
  switch (object) {
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_NORMAL";
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INVALID:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_INVALID";
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_NORMAL";
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_INVALID";
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_UNLOCKED";
    case MatchStatus.MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED:
      return "MATCH_STATUS_INACTIVE_UNLOCKED";
    case MatchStatus.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

  /** US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN - 未知 */
  US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN = 0,
  /** US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT - 是美国PayPal账户 */
  US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT = 1,
  /** NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT - 不是美国PayPal账户 */
  NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT = 2,
  UNRECOGNIZED = -1,
}

export function uSPaypalAccountTypeFromJSON(object: any): USPaypalAccountType {
  switch (object) {
    case 0:
    case "US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN":
      return USPaypalAccountType.US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN;
    case 1:
    case "US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT":
      return USPaypalAccountType.US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT;
    case 2:
    case "NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT":
      return USPaypalAccountType.NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT;
    case -1:
    case "UNRECOGNIZED":
    default:
      return USPaypalAccountType.UNRECOGNIZED;
  }
}

export function uSPaypalAccountTypeToJSON(object: USPaypalAccountType): string {
  switch (object) {
    case USPaypalAccountType.US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN:
      return "US_PAYPAL_UNKNOWN";
    case USPaypalAccountType.US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT:
      return "US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT";
    case USPaypalAccountType.NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT:
      return "NON_US_PAYPAL_ACCOUNT";
    case USPaypalAccountType.UNRECOGNIZED:
    default:
      return "UNRECOGNIZED";
  }
}

export interface UserInfo {
  userId?: number | undefined;
  avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
  username?: string | undefined;
  bio?: string | undefined;
  age?: number | undefined;
  gender?: Gender | undefined;
  productLevel?: ProductLevel | undefined;
  nickname?: string | undefined;
  createdDays?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** optional */
  userStatus?: UserStatus | undefined;
  balance?: number | undefined;
  pending?: boolean | undefined;
  userType?: UserType | undefined;
  profession?: string | undefined;
  geoLocation?: UserGeoLocation | undefined;
  botId?: string | undefined;
  customAvatar?: PictureInQuery | undefined;
  userSource?: string | undefined;
  postPictures?: PostPictureInQuery[] | undefined;
  interestTabs?: InterestTab[] | undefined;
  isOnline?: boolean | undefined;
  profileImage?: ProfileImage | undefined;
  postCount?: number | undefined;
  lastActiveTime?: number | undefined;
  education?: string | undefined;
  isVip?: boolean | undefined;
  phoneNumber?: string | undefined;
  selfie?: PictureInQuery | undefined;
  race?: Race | undefined;
  timUsersig?: string | undefined;
  beautifiedAvatar?: string | undefined;
  susBot?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 这个默认只有match feed有 */
  triggerMatch?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 用户来源类型 */
  userFromType?:
    | UserFromType
    | undefined;
  /** 用户app类型 */
  appType?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 用户人脸是否校验 - 其他所有拉取用户信息的接口都带改字段 */
  isFaceVerified?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 用户是否支付过 */
  isPaid?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 用户颜值分 */
  faceScore?: number | undefined;
  height?: number | undefined;
  birthday?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** pwa用户是否是视频测试用户, 否就是 文字 */
  isVideoTest?: boolean | undefined;
  score?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 工会邀请码 */
  invitationCode?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户的emoji头像 */
  emojiAvatar?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户的emoji grey头像 */
  emojiAvatarGrey?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户INS id */
  insId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户INS头像 */
  insAvatar?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户的emoji work头像 */
  emojiAvatarWork?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 用户是否是INS PWA用户 */
  isInsPwa?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 是否为主播 */
  isClubUser?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 拨打pwa忙线时间 */
  callPwaTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 视频等级 */
  callOrderRank?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 是否是被淘汰的小利女 */
  isEliminatedXiaoli?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 是否是官方账号 */
  isOfficial?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 是否已授权google登陆 */
  userThirdPartyLoginState?: UserThirdPartyLoginState | undefined;
  createdAt?: number | undefined;
}

/** ------------- digital human ------------- */
export interface AdminUserInfo {
  userId?: number | undefined;
  username?: string | undefined;
  regulationStatus?: string | undefined;
  age?: number | undefined;
  detectedAge?: number | undefined;
  rsaEncoded?: string | undefined;
  adminLabel?: string | undefined;
  gender?: Gender | undefined;
  detectedGender?: Gender | undefined;
  userType?: UserType | undefined;
  nickname?: string | undefined;
  avatarUrl?: string | undefined;
  thirdPartyLoginUserId?: string | undefined;
  bio?: string | undefined;
  textInterests?: InterestTab[] | undefined;
  imageInterests?: InterestTab[] | undefined;
  isOnline?: boolean | undefined;
  deviceIds?: string[] | undefined;
  createdAt?: number | undefined;
  updatedAt?: number | undefined;
  deletedAt?: number | undefined;
  platform?: string | undefined;
  lastActiveTime?: number | undefined;
  productLevel?: ProductLevel | undefined;
  suspensionReleaseTime?: number | undefined;
  geoLocation?: UserGeoLocation | undefined;
  profession?: string | undefined;
  botId?: string | undefined;
  customAvatar?: PictureInQuery | undefined;
  userSource?: string | undefined;
  education?: string | undefined;
  selfie?: PictureInQuery | undefined;
  race?: Race | undefined;
  phoneNumbers?: string | undefined;
  susBot?: number | undefined;
  beautifiedAvatar?: string | undefined;
  appName?: number | undefined;
  thidPartyLoginPlatform?:
    | ThirdPartyLoginUser
    | undefined;
  /** 用户人脸是否校验 - 其他所有拉取用户信息的接口都带改字段 */
  isFaceVerified?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 用户是否支付过 */
  isPaid?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 用户颜值分 */
  faceScore?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 是否通过pwa视频认证 */
  isPwaVideoVerify?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 排序分 */
  sortScore?: number | undefined;
  invitationCode?: string | undefined;
  callOrderRank?: number | undefined;
}

/** 请求 */
export interface AdminGetActionCountsInRangeRequest {
  /** 开始时间，格式：2024-07-16T00:00:00Z (ISO 8601) */
  startTime?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 结束时间，格式：2024-07-16T23:59:59Z (ISO 8601) */
  endTime?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 行为类型：PAID 或 REFUND */
  type?: ActionType | undefined;
}

/** 单个时间点的行为数量快照 */
export interface ActionCountSnapshot {
  /** 时间戳，格式：2024-07-16T00:00:00Z (ISO 8601) */
  timestamp?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 该时间点的总数（付费用户总数或总退款数） */
  totalCount?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 该时间点新增的数量（新增付费用户数或新增退款数） */
  increasedCount?: number | undefined;
}

/** 响应 */
export interface AdminGetActionCountsInRangeResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 在请求的时间范围内，每个小时的行为数量快照 */
  actionCountSnapshots?: ActionCountSnapshot[] | undefined;
}

/** 请求 */
export interface AdminGetActionUserListInRangeRequest {
  /** 开始时间，格式：2024-07-16T00:00:00Z (ISO 8601) */
  startTime?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 结束时间，格式：2024-07-16T23:59:59Z (ISO 8601) */
  endTime?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 行为类型：PAID 或 REFUND */
  type?: ActionType | undefined;
  cursor?: number | undefined;
  pageSize?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 0 = Created_at, 1 = Updated_at */
  sortKey?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 对应userinfo里的app_name */
  appName?: number | undefined;
}

/** 响应 */
export interface AdminGetActionUserListInRangeResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 时间范围内的行为用户列表（付费或退款） */
  actionUserList?: AdminUserSubscriptionInfo[] | undefined;
  nextCursor?: number | undefined;
  totalCount?: number | undefined;
}

export interface AdminUserSubscriptionInfo {
  userInfo?: AdminUserInfo | undefined;
  userId?: number | undefined;
  purchaseDate?: string | undefined;
  actionType?: ActionType | undefined;
  iosProductId?: string | undefined;
  amount?: number | undefined;
  iosKeyId?: string | undefined;
  iosBundleId?: string | undefined;
  iosTransactionId?: string | undefined;
  iosOriginalTransactionId?: string | undefined;
  updatedAt?: string | undefined;
  expireDate?: string | undefined;
  androidPackageName?: string | undefined;
  androidProductId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 支付渠道：Google Pay，Apple Pay，Waffo */
  paymentProvider?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 第三方支付的支付方式：GOOGLEPAY，APPLEPAY，VISA_CREDITCARD */
  paymentMethod?: string | undefined;
}

export interface AdminGetPwaActionUserListInRangeRequest {
  /** 开始时间戳（ms） */
  startTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 结束时间戳（ms） */
  endTime?: number | undefined;
  cursor?: number | undefined;
  pageSize?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 0 = Created_at, 1 = Updated_at */
  sortKey?: number | undefined;
}

/** 响应 */

  message?:
    | string

    | Uint8Array

   * AAC - audio/aac
   * OGG Vorbis - audio/ogg
   * FLAC - audio/flac
   */
  fileType?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 单位秒 */

    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 单位 字节 */
  size?: number | undefined;
}

  code?:
    | UserServiceCommonCode
    | undefined;
  /** if fail */

  url?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 音频里的文字内容 */

    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 1-4 分别对应场景1-4 */
  topic?: string | undefined;
}

  userId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface QueryVoiceGreetingResponse {

    | UserServiceCommonCode
    | undefined;
  /** if fail */

  urls?: string[] | undefined;

}

export interface WaffoPaymentParams {
  successUrl?: string | undefined;
  failedUrl?: string | undefined;
}

/** === 新增：第三方支付下单接口 === */
export interface CreatePaymentRequest {
  /** 商品ID (coin_bundle_id 或 subscription_id) */
  productId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 渠道标识: "WAFFO" */
  provider?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 明确业务类型，决定调用渠道的哪个接口 */
  bizType?:
    | PaymentBizType
    | undefined;
  /** 支持使用的支付方式 */
  paymentMethods?:
    | PaymentMethod[]
    | undefined;
  /** waffo渠道的配置 */
  waffoParams?:
    | WaffoPaymentParams
    | undefined;
  /** 新增：是否使用内部收银台 */
  useInternalCashier?: boolean | undefined;
}

export interface CreatePaymentResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 系统订单号 */
  orderId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 跳转支付收银台的 URL */
  redirectUrl?: string | undefined;
}

/** S2S 支付执行请求 (前端内部收银台 -> 后端) */
export interface ExecutePaymentRequest {
  /** 业务订单号 */
  orderId?: string | undefined;
  provider?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 支付要素 (注意传输安全 HTTPS) */
  cardNumber?: string | undefined;
  expiryMonth?: string | undefined;
  expiryYear?: string | undefined;
  cvc?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单姓氏 */
  cardFirstName?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单名字 */
  cardLastName?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单地址 (S2S 必填) */
  email?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** ISO 2位代码, e.g. "US" */
  countryCode?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 州或省代码（如 ISO 3166-2中定义）。例如，美国的 CA */
  state?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单城市 */
  city?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单街道 */
  street?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单邮政编码美国的地址最多为五位数字，其他国家的地址最多为十个字符 */
  zipCode?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 账单电话 */
  phone?: string | undefined;
}

/** S2S 支付响应 */
export interface ExecutePaymentResponse {
  code?: number | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 支付状态: SUCCESS, FAILED, REQUIRE_3DS */
  status?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 如果需要 3DS 验证，这里返回银行页面 URL */
  redirectUrl?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 回显订单信息，方便前端展示结果页 */
  orderId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 币种，例如 "USD" */
  currency?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 价格，建议使用 string 传输 (e.g. "3.99") 保证精度 */
  price?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 渠道流水号，方便前端排查问题 */
  providerTxId?: string | undefined;
}

/** 查询订单状态 */
export interface QueryPaymentOrderStatusRequest {
  orderId?: string | undefined;
}

export interface QueryPaymentOrderStatusResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** CREATE/PENDING/SUCCESS/FAILED/ACTIVE/EXPIRE/CANCEL */
  status?: string | undefined;
  productId?: string | undefined;
  price?: number | undefined;
  bizType?: PaymentBizType | undefined;
  provider?: string | undefined;
  paymentMethod?: PaymentMethod | undefined;
  coins?: number | undefined;
  failedReason?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 时间戳ms */
  purchaseTime?: number | undefined;
}

/** 订单相关信息 */
export interface InsExchangeOrderInfo {
  /** 订单id */

    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 订单创建时间 */
  createAt?:
    | number
    | undefined;

  updateAt?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 订单过期时间 */
  expireAt?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 创建者用户id，因为订单可以双向创建，所以这里双向保存一下 */
  createUserId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** ios用户id */
  maleUserId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** pwa用户id */
  femaleUserId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 支付状态 INIT：初始化IN交换订 PAID:IOS用户已经支付该订 FINISH: 订单已经完结,已经交换过联系方式 REJECT:订单被拒 REFUNDED:该订单已经退回-退还后给用户加金币 */
  status?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 是否follow过 */
  followed?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** 关联的礼物id */
  relateGiftId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 关联的礼物金币值 */
  relateGiftCoin?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 关联的TIM平台的消息ID */
  timeMessageId?: string | undefined;
}

    | undefined;

    | number
    | undefined;

    | boolean

}

    | undefined;

    | undefined;

    | number

    | string
    | undefined;

/** 上报 A/B 测金币配置请求 */
export interface ReportCoinOfferRequest {
  /** iOS 产品ID (原: dtc_message_coins_ios_product_id) */
  dtcMessageCoinsIosProductId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** Android 产品ID (原: dtc_message_coins_android_product_id) */
  dtcMessageCoinsAndroidProductId?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 配置金币数量 (原: dtc_message_coins_number) */
  dtcMessageCoinsNumber?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 原价 (原: dtc_message_coins_original_price) */
  dtcMessageCoinsOriginalPrice?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 现价 (原: dtc_message_coins_current_price) */
  dtcMessageCoinsCurrentPrice?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 优惠比例 (原: dtc_message_coins_extra_percentage) */
  dtcMessageCoinsExtraPercentage?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 限时倒计时(秒) (原: dtc_message_coins_count_down_time) */
  dtcMessageCoinsCountDownTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 三方 Channel (原: dtc_message_coins_pay_channel) */
  dtcMessageCoinsPayChannel?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 三方 Router (原: dtc_message_coins_pay_router) */
  dtcMessageCoinsPayRouter?:
    | string[]
    | undefined;
  /** 触发时间点 (原: dtc_message_coins_trigger_time，例如 20:00) */
  dtcMessageCoinsTriggerTime?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 是否触发 Push (原: is_dtc_message_coins_push, 0或1) */
  isDtcMessageCoinsPush?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /**
   * 消息内容文案列表 (原: is_dtc_message_coins_push_contents)
   * 支持多条，使用 repeated 数组
   */
  isDtcMessageCoinsPushContents?:
    | string[]
    | undefined;
  /**
   * 消息内容文案列表 (原: is_dtc_message_coins_push_titles)
   * 支持多条，使用 repeated 数组
   */
  isDtcMessageCoinsPushTitles?: string[] | undefined;
}

  /** 引用你通用的状态码枚举 (假设叫 UserServiceCommonCode) */
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
}

  pageNum?: number | undefined;
  pageSize?: number | undefined;
}

export interface QueryPwaVideoResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  videoInfo?: PwaVideoInfo[] | undefined;
  total?: number | undefined;
}

export interface PwaVideoInfo {
  targetUserId?: number | undefined;
  videoUrl?: string | undefined;
  orderId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 是否是mock视频  0:不是 1:是 */
  mock?: boolean | undefined;
  callDuration?: number | undefined;
  targetUserName?: string | undefined;
  startTime?: string | undefined;
}

export interface PunishmentPwaRequest {
  userId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 0:解封 1:封禁  2:警告 */
  type?:
    | PunishmentTypeEnum
    | undefined;
  /** 处罚/警告原因 */
  message?: string | undefined;
}

export interface PunishmentPwaResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
}

export interface QueryTopUserRequest {
  /** pwa id */
  userId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 查询时间范围 单位天(全部则不限制) */
  limitDay?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 查询top n个用户 */
  topN?: number | undefined;
}

export interface QueryTopUserResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  topUserInfo?: TopUserInfo[] | undefined;
}

export interface TopUserInfo {
  /** 用户id */
  userId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 总充值金额 */
  totalChargeAmount?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 总视频时长 */
  totalVideoDuration?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 与pwa视频时长 */
  pwaVideoDuration?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 用户名称 */
  userName?: string | undefined;
}

export interface QueryPwaDataOperationLogRequest {
  userId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface QueryPwaDataOperationLogResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  log?: PwaDataOperationLog[] | undefined;
}

export interface PwaDataOperationLog {
  /** 操作人 */
  operator?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 操作时间 */
  createTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 操作内容 */
  content?: string | undefined;
}

/** 流量调整请求 */
export interface AdjustTrafficRequest {
  /** 用户id */
  userId?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 调整系数 */
  adjustCoefficient?: number | undefined;
}

export interface AdjustTrafficResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
}

export interface GetPostPicturesRequest {

}

export interface GetPostPicturesResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  userId?: number | undefined;

}

export interface QueryPunishmentRequest {
  userId?: number | undefined;
}

export interface QueryPunishmentResponse {
  bannedMessage?: string | undefined;
  warnMessage?: string | undefined;
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  banned?: boolean | undefined;
}

/** 8.1 获取旷视 FaceID Token */

export interface GetFaceIdTokenResponse {

export interface GetCallOrderPriceRequest {
}

export interface GetCallOrderPriceResponse {
  userId?: number | undefined;

}

/** 接口1: 落地页信息 (公开) */
export interface BffGetLandingInfoRequest {
  inviteCode?: string | undefined;
}

export interface BffGetLandingInfoResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  inviterNickname?: string | undefined;
  inviterAvatar?: string | undefined;
  title?: string | undefined;
  subtitle?: string | undefined;
}

/** 接口3: 入口概览 */
export interface BffGetOverviewRequest {
}

export interface BffGetOverviewResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** NO_INVITE | REWARD_READY | FRIEND_EARNING | IN_PROGRESS */
  entryStatus?: string | undefined;
  activeInviteCount?: number | undefined;
  totalInviteCount?: number | undefined;
  hasUnconsumedEvent?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** format: username_last3digits (e.g., alice_123) */
  inviteCode?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** reward amount for invitee after signup */
  inviteeSignupRewardDollars?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** reward amount for inviter after invitee signup */
  inviterSignupRewardDollars?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** 展示内容 */
  content?: OverviewContent | undefined;
}

export interface OverviewContent {
  title?: string | undefined;
  subTitle?: string | undefined;
}

/** 接口4: Dashboard */
export interface BffGetDashboardRequest {
}

export interface BffSquadMember {
  relationshipId?: number | undefined;
  inviteeUserId?: number | undefined;
  nickname?: string | undefined;
  avatar?: string | undefined;
  currentStage?: number | undefined;
  maxStageReached?: number | undefined;
  withdrawSuccessCount?: number | undefined;
  riskStatus?: string | undefined;
  rewardStatus?: string | undefined;
  createdAt?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** Unix timestamp in seconds */
  lastActiveTime?:
    | number
    | undefined;
  /** "active" | "idle" | "inactive" | "very_inactive" */
  activeStatus?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** configurable display copy */
  activeStatusCopy?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** stage-specific reminder text for this invitee */
  stageReminderCopy?: string | undefined;
}

export interface BffGetDashboardResponse {
  code?: UserServiceCommonCode | undefined;
  message?: string | undefined;
  squadList?: BffSquadMember[] | undefined;
  totalCount?: number | undefined;
  hasPendingCoinAnimation?:
    | boolean
    | undefined;
  /** format: username_last3digits (e.g., alice_123) */
  inviteCode?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** default "Earn ${} for EVERY friend!" auto fill */
  defaultContent?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** 默认 */
  defaultRewards?: DefaultRewardItem[] | undefined;
  lockedAmountDollars?: number | undefined;
  availableAmountDollars?: number | undefined;
  historicalWithdrawAmountDollars?: number | undefined;
  buttonText?:
    | string
    | undefined;
  /** configurable share copy for inviter */
  shareText?: string | undefined;
}

export interface DefaultRewardItem {
  title?: string | undefined;
  subTitle?: string | undefined;
}

function createBaseUploadPicture(): UploadPicture {
  return { name: "", file: new Uint8Array(0) };
}

export const UploadPicture: MessageFns<UploadPicture, "UserServiceProto.UploadPicture"> = {
  $type: "UserServiceProto.UploadPicture" as const,

  encode(message: UploadPicture, writer: BinaryWriter = new BinaryWriter()): BinaryWriter {
    if (message.name !== undefined && message.name !== "") {
      writer.uint32(10).string(message.name);
    }
    if (message.file !== undefined && message.file.length !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(18).bytes(message.file);
    }
    return writer;
  },

  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): UploadPicture {
    const reader = input instanceof BinaryReader ? input : new BinaryReader(input);
    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseUploadPicture();
    while (reader.pos < end) {
      const tag = reader.uint32();
      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 10) {
            break;
          }

          message.name = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 18) {
            break;
          }

          message.file = reader.bytes();
          continue;
        }
      }
      if ((tag & 7) === 4 || tag === 0) {
        break;
      }
      reader.skip(tag & 7);
    }
    return message;
  },

  fromJSON(object: any): UploadPicture {
    return {
      name: isSet(object.name) ? globalThis.String(object.name) : "",
      file: isSet(object.file) ? bytesFromBase64(object.file) : new Uint8Array(0),
    };
  },

  toJSON(message: UploadPicture): unknown {
    const obj: any = {};
    if (message.name !== undefined && message.name !== "") {
      obj.name = message.name;
    }
    if (message.file !== undefined && message.file.length !== 0) {
      obj.file = base64FromBytes(message.file);
    }
    return obj;
  },

  create<I extends Exact<DeepPartial<UploadPicture>, I>>(base?: I): UploadPicture {
    return UploadPicture.fromPartial(base ?? ({} as any));
  },
  fromPartial<I extends Exact<DeepPartial<UploadPicture>, I>>(object: I): UploadPicture {
    const message = createBaseUploadPicture();
    message.name = object.name ?? "";
    message.file = object.file ?? new Uint8Array(0);
    return message;
  },
};

function createBasePictureInQuery(): PictureInQuery {
  return {
    url: "",
    width: 0,
    height: 0,
    minUrl: "",
    minWidth: 0,
    minHeight: 0,
    midUrl: "",
    midWidth: 0,
    midHeight: 0,
    state: 0,
  };
}

    const message = createBasePictureInQuery();
    while (reader.pos < end) {
      const tag = reader.uint32();
      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 10) {
            break;
          }

          message.url = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 16) {
            break;
          }

          message.width = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 3: {
          if (tag !== 24) {
            break;
          }

          message.height = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 4: {
          if (tag !== 34) {
            break;
          }

          message.minUrl = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 5: {
          if (tag !== 40) {
            break;
          }

          message.minWidth = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 6: {
          if (tag !== 48) {
            break;
          }

          message.minHeight = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 7: {
          if (tag !== 58) {
            break;
          }

          message.midUrl = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 8: {
          if (tag !== 64) {
            break;
          }

          message.midWidth = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
        case 9: {
          if (tag !== 72) {
            break;
          }

          message.midHeight = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }

        ? globalThis.Number(object.minWidth)
        : isSet(object.min_width)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.min_width)
        : 0,
      minHeight: isSet(object.minHeight)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.minHeight)
        : isSet(object.min_height)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.min_height)
        : 0,
      midUrl: isSet(object.midUrl)

        : isSet(object.mid_url)
        ? globalThis.String(object.mid_url)
        : "",
      midWidth: isSet(object.midWidth)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.midWidth)
        : isSet(object.mid_width)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.mid_width)
        : 0,
      midHeight: isSet(object.midHeight)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.midHeight)
        : isSet(object.mid_height)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.mid_height)
        : 0,

    }
    if (message.height !== undefined && message.height !== 0) {
      obj.height = Math.round(message.height);
    }
    if (message.minUrl !== undefined && message.minUrl !== "") {
      obj.minUrl = message.minUrl;
    }
    if (message.minWidth !== undefined && message.minWidth !== 0) {
      obj.minWidth = Math.round(message.minWidth);
    }
    if (message.minHeight !== undefined && message.minHeight !== 0) {

      obj.midUrl = message.midUrl;
    }
    if (message.midWidth !== undefined && message.midWidth !== 0) {
      obj.midWidth = Math.round(message.midWidth);
    }
    if (message.midHeight !== undefined && message.midHeight !== 0) {

        ? globalThis.String(object.third_party_login_user_id)

function createBaseLoginUserResponse(): LoginUserResponse {
  return {
    isNewUser: false,
    userinfo: undefined,
    token: "",
    timUsersig: "",
    postLoginAction: 0,
    code: 0,
    nextTokenRefreshTime: 0,
    balance: 0,
  };
}

export const LoginUserResponse: MessageFns<LoginUserResponse, "UserServiceProto.LoginUserResponse"> = {
  $type: "UserServiceProto.LoginUserResponse" as const,

  encode(message: LoginUserResponse, writer: BinaryWriter = new BinaryWriter()): BinaryWriter {
    if (message.isNewUser !== undefined && message.isNewUser !== false) {
      writer.uint32(8).bool(message.isNewUser);
    }
    if (message.userinfo !== undefined) {
      GetUserInfoResponse.encode(message.userinfo, writer.uint32(18).fork()).join();
    }
    if (message.token !== undefined && message.token !== "") {
      writer.uint32(26).string(message.token);
    }
    if (message.timUsersig !== undefined && message.timUsersig !== "") {
      writer.uint32(34).string(message.timUsersig);
    }
    if (message.postLoginAction !== undefined && message.postLoginAction !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(40).int32(message.postLoginAction);
    }
    if (message.code !== undefined && message.code !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(48).int32(message.code);
    }

      writer.uint32(56).int64(message.nextTokenRefreshTime);

    }
    return writer;

  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): LoginUserResponse {
    const reader = input instanceof BinaryReader ? input : new BinaryReader(input);
    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseLoginUserResponse();
    while (reader.pos < end) {

      switch (tag >>> 3) {
        case 1: {
          if (tag !== 8) {
            break;
          }

          message.isNewUser = reader.bool();
          continue;
        }
        case 2: {
          if (tag !== 18) {
            break;
          }

          message.userinfo = GetUserInfoResponse.decode(reader, reader.uint32());
          continue;
        }
        case 3: {
          if (tag !== 26) {
            break;
          }

          message.token = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 4: {
          if (tag !== 34) {
            break;
          }

          message.timUsersig = reader.string();
          continue;
        }
        case 5: {
          if (tag !== 40) {
            break;
          }

          message.postLoginAction = reader.int32() as any;
          continue;
        }
        case 6: {
          if (tag !== 48) {
            break;
          }

          message.code = reader.int32() as any;
          continue;
        }
        case 7: {
          if (tag !== 56) {
            break;
          }

          message.nextTokenRefreshTime = longToNumber(reader.int64());
          continue;
        }
        case 10: {
          if (tag !== 80) {
            break;
          }

          message.balance = reader.int32();
          continue;
        }
      }
      if ((tag & 7) === 4 || tag === 0) {
        break;
      }
      reader.skip(tag & 7);
    }
    return message;
  },

  fromJSON(object: any): LoginUserResponse {
    return {
      isNewUser: isSet(object.isNewUser)
        ? globalThis.Boolean(object.isNewUser)
        : isSet(object.is_new_user)
        ? globalThis.Boolean(object.is_new_user)
        : false,
      userinfo: isSet(object.userinfo) ? GetUserInfoResponse.fromJSON(object.userinfo) : undefined,
      token: isSet(object.token) ? globalThis.String(object.token) : "",
      timUsersig: isSet(object.timUsersig)
        ? globalThis.String(object.timUsersig)
        : isSet(object.tim_usersig)
        ? globalThis.String(object.tim_usersig)
        : "",
      postLoginAction: isSet(object.postLoginAction)
        ? postLoginActionFromJSON(object.postLoginAction)
        : isSet(object.post_login_action)
        ? postLoginActionFromJSON(object.post_login_action)
        : 0,
      code: isSet(object.code) ? userServiceCommonCodeFromJSON(object.code) : 0,
      nextTokenRefreshTime: isSet(object.nextTokenRefreshTime)
        ? globalThis.Number(object.nextTokenRefreshTime)
        : isSet(object.next_token_refresh_time)

    }
    if (message.token !== undefined && message.token !== "") {
      obj.token = message.token;
    }
    if (message.timUsersig !== undefined && message.timUsersig !== "") {
      obj.timUsersig = message.timUsersig;
    }
    if (message.postLoginAction !== undefined && message.postLoginAction !== 0) {

    }
    if (message.nextTokenRefreshTime !== undefined && message.nextTokenRefreshTime !== 0) {
      obj.nextTokenRefreshTime = Math.round(message.nextTokenRefreshTime);
    }
    if (message.balance !== undefined && message.balance !== 0) {

    }
    return obj;

  create<I extends Exact<DeepPartial<LoginUserResponse>, I>>(base?: I): LoginUserResponse {

  fromPartial<I extends Exact<DeepPartial<LoginUserResponse>, I>>(object: I): LoginUserResponse {

    const message = createBaseFastLoginRequest();

    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;

          }

          continue;
        }

          message.nextTokenRefreshTime = longToNumber(reader.int64());

    gender: 0,
    productLevel: 0,
    nickname: "",
    createdDays: 0,
    userStatus: 0,

    }

    }
    if (message.gender !== undefined && message.gender !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(48).int32(message.gender);
    }
    if (message.productLevel !== undefined && message.productLevel !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(56).int32(message.productLevel);
    }

      writer.uint32(66).string(message.nickname);
    }
    if (message.createdDays !== undefined && message.createdDays !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(72).int32(message.createdDays);
    }
    if (message.userStatus !== undefined && message.userStatus !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(80).int32(message.userStatus);
    }
    if (message.balance !== undefined && message.balance !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(88).int32(message.balance);
    }
    if (message.pending !== undefined && message.pending !== false) {
      writer.uint32(96).bool(message.pending);
    }
    if (message.userType !== undefined && message.userType !== 0) {
      writer.uint32(104).int32(message.userType);
    }
    if (message.profession !== undefined && message.profession !== "") {
      writer.uint32(114).string(message.profession);
    }

    if (message.botId !== undefined && message.botId !== "") {

    }

    }

  },

  decode(input: BinaryReader | Uint8Array, length?: number): UserInfo {
    const reader = input instanceof BinaryReader ? input : new BinaryReader(input);
    const end = length === undefined ? reader.len : reader.pos + length;
    const message = createBaseUserInfo();
    while (reader.pos < end) {
      const tag = reader.uint32();

          continue;
